heroSection.heroSubtitle: I specialize in building robust cloud infrastructure and high-performance applications. From complex backends to seamless user experiences, I engineer software that grows with your business.

coreTechnologiesSection.coreTechnologiesSubtitle: Delivering end-to-end solutions by integrating <highlight>modern frontends</highlight> with <highlight>robust backends</highlight> and <highlight>cloud-native infrastructure</highlight>.

ProjectSection.title: Projects
ProjectSection.description: A collection of my work in cloud architecture, DevOps automation, and full-stack engineering. Explore my open source contributions and professional case studies.

projects.description: Community-driven Progressive Web App (PWA) for real-time reporting of urban incidents and infrastructure issues.

detailTopics.title: The Challenge
detailTopics.description: Communities often lack a unified, accessible platform to report and track local issues like infrastructure damage, water leaks, or safety incidents. Information is usually scattered across social media or lost in bureaucratic channels, leaving neighbors uninformed and problems unresolved. The goal was to build a centralized, community-driven tool that empowers people to map out local issues visually, collaborate through updates, and stay informed about their surroundings in real-time.

detailTopics.title: The Solution
detailTopics.description: I engineered a fast, mobile-first Progressive Web App (PWA) designed for seamless civic engagement. The frontend, built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS, provides a clean, native-like experience on any device. For the backend, I integrated Supabase, leveraging PostgreSQL and PostGIS to handle complex spatial data and location-based queries. By combining interactive Leaflet maps with client-side image compression and strict Row Level Security (RLS) policies, the platform ensures data integrity while offering real-time visibility into community-reported incidents.

keyFeatures.title: Interactive Spatial Mapping
keyFeatures.description: Dynamic map interface powered by Leaflet and PostGIS, allowing users to accurately pinpoint and visualize incidents based on their GPS coordinates.

keyFeatures.title: Real-time Community Reporting
keyFeatures.description: End-to-end incident tracking featuring secure photo uploads, localized issue tagging, and a comment system for community updates.

keyFeatures.title: Progressive Web App (PWA)
keyFeatures.description: Optimized for mobile performance with robust caching strategies, allowing users to install the app directly to their home screen.

keyFeatures.title: Robust Security & i18n
keyFeatures.description: Multi-language support (English/Spanish) and secure data management using Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) to protect user-generated content.

projects.description: A specialized service-on-demand platform connecting verified providers with corporate and individual clients.

detailTopics.title: The Challenge
detailTopics.description: Finding reliable local professionals (plumbers, electricians, tutors) is often a fragmented experience plagued by low trust and slow communication. The lack of standardized pricing and verification creates friction for users, while skilled providers struggle to maintain visibility in a crowded, unorganized market. The objective was to build a bridge that guarantees trust and immediacy.

detailTopics.title: The Solution
detailTopics.description: I developed Service Conecta as a mobile-first ecosystem using Flutter for a seamless cross-platform experience. The architecture relies on a NestJS backend with WebSockets to handle real-time negotiation and status updates. I implemented a precise geolocation engine that allows users to track providers in real-time (similar to ride-sharing apps) while managing complex background services to ensure battery efficiency for the worker's app.

keyFeatures.title: Live Geo-Tracking
keyFeatures.description: Real-time provider location tracking using background services and optimized map rendering.

keyFeatures.title: Instant Negotiation
keyFeatures.description: In-app chat and quote system powered by WebSockets for sub-second latency.

keyFeatures.title: Trusted Verification
keyFeatures.description: Automated identity checks and a robust rating system to ensure community safety.

AboutSection.experienceDescription: My journey has been defined by a passion for scalable infrastructure and sustainable tech. Starting as a junior dev tinkering with monolithic apps, I've navigated through the complexities of cloud engineering to master DevOps practices.

currentFocusItems.title: English Proficiency
currentFocusItems.subtitle: Actively working to achieve level B2 for global collaboration.

jobDescriptions.description: Lead a team of +10 developers using Scrum, increasing sprint velocity by 15% through code reviews and technical mentoring. Optimized existing user interfaces with JavaScript and CSS, improving loading performance by 60%. Reduced critical errors by 40% through code refactoring and implementing effective solutions.

Developed and deployed a web application (SPA) with Angular, reducing user load times by 30% and improving page retention. Built scalable RESTful APIs with Spring Boot and Java, capable of handling over 5,000 requests per hour during peak usage. Collaborated on Kubernetes deployment automation, reducing new feature deployment time by 50%.

Led the development of 3 responsive web applications from scratch. Created a hybrid mobile application with Flutter. Managed a multidisciplinary team of 5 members (developers and QA), ensuring on-time delivery of 90% of project milestones.

Implemented a new content management system that enabled the team to update the website 80% faster without technical intervention. Resolved an average of 7 second-level support tickets per week, maintaining 99.5% uptime on critical business applications.
Developed a key module for an internal application using C# and ASP.NET MVC that automated a manual process, saving the HR department 10 hours of work per week.
Developed and maintained websites for local clients and provided technical support, achieving a 90% customer satisfaction rate.
Developed and maintained dynamic websites using C#, HTML, and Visual Basic, ensuring functionality, performance, and user-friendly design.
